allow: Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=8 xzhang@xzgpu.uom.memphis.edu 'hostname && echo OK && ls /mnt/project/xzhang 2>/dev/null | head')

Bash(git commit -q -m 'M2: temporal operator algebra O1-O12 + brute-force oracle + property/metamorphic tests *)

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes xzhang@xzgpu.uom.memphis.edu 'mkdir -p /mnt/project/xzhang/tgms/repo.git /mnt/project/xzhang/tgms/work && cd /mnt/project/xzhang/tgms/repo.git && git init --bare -b main 2>&1 | tail -1 && echo "--- env:" && \(command -v uv && uv --version\) 2>/dev/null; python3 --version 2>/dev/null; nproc; free -g | head -2; nvidia-smi --query-gpu=name,memory.total --format=csv,noheader 2>/dev/null')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes xzhang@xzgpu.uom.memphis.edu 'cd /mnt/project/xzhang/tgms/repo.git && \(ls HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo has-head || \(git init --bare . 2>&1 | tail -1 && git symbolic-ref HEAD refs/heads/main\)\) && git --version')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes xzhang@xzgpu.uom.memphis.edu 'cd /mnt/project/xzhang/tgms/work && \(git clone -q /mnt/project/xzhang/tgms/repo.git tgms 2>/dev/null || \(cd tgms && git pull -q\)\) && cd tgms && git log --oneline | head -3')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes xzhang@xzgpu.uom.memphis.edu 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"; command -v uv >/dev/null || \(curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh\) >/dev/null 2>&1; uv --version && cd /mnt/project/xzhang/tgms/work/tgms && uv python install 3.12 2>&1 | tail -1 && uv sync --extra agent 2>&1 | tail -1')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes xzhang@xzgpu.uom.memphis.edu 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"; cd /mnt/project/xzhang/tgms/work/tgms && uv run pytest tests/ 2>&1 | tail -2')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes xzhang@xzgpu.uom.memphis.edu 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"; cd /mnt/project/xzhang/tgms/work/tgms && make synth-1m && make bench-ops STORE=stores/synth-1m')

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes xzhang@xzgpu.uom.memphis.edu 'pkill -f "tgms \(synth|ingest|bench\)" 2>/dev/null; cd /mnt/project/xzhang/tgms/work/tgms && git pull -q && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && rm -rf stores/synth-1m && \(make synth-1m && make bench-ops STORE=stores/synth-1m && cat docs/bench_ops.md\) 2>&1 | tail -25')
